mapper.select: select c1.id as commentId, c1.user_id as userId, u.username as username, u.user_avatar as userAvatar, c1.content as content, c1.create_time as createTime, u2.username as replyUsername from tb_comment c1 join tb_user u ON c1.user_id = u.id left join tb_comment c2 ON c1.parent_id = c2.id left join tb_user u2 ON c2.user_id = u2.id WHERE c1.id = #{commentId}
